informativeness_control_fails.label: ROUND-WITNESS-0.1
informativeness_control_fails.lesson: the float reading != the coupling on a genuine-rounding cell; only the EFT account recovers the coupling — trusting the float reading alone would take the fingerprint for the coupling

grader_clauses.PMG-B.1: the SEPARATOR closes (CL-G3): on every FX-G-B cell the EFT account closes exactly in ℚ — coupling-holonomy == holonomy_float + account — so the coupling is separable from the route fingerprint in finite precision. The protection predicate (HR134 amendment-6 L1-L4) is SOUND: predicate-protected ⟹ fingerprint == 0 (coupling read clean). Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-B.2: the coincidental class is NAMED, not banked (CL-G3 cont.): a NOT-protected cell whose four corner residues are common-mode cancels to fingerprint == 0 (the finite-precision cousin of Arm M CL-M4); it is reported as `separated_coincidental`, NOT conflated with a protected read and NOT banked as CL-M4 itself. The derived witness (0.1 = RN(1/10), s=53>26) is a genuine rounding cell: fingerprint != 0, coupling recovered exactly by the account. Two-sided. Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-B.3: the boundary is distinct (CL-G4): the coupling crosses the pinned floor 2^-40; certify above (a separated verdict), refuse below (`below_detection`). The boundary cells are protected (no rounding), isolating representation-exhaustion from the rounding fingerprint. Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-B.4: determinism: the Stage-B record set is byte-identical across two runs (sha256 over records).

status_move_rules: CL-G3 -> DEMONSTRATED iff the account closes on EVERY cell AND the predicate is sound on EVERY cell (no protected cell with a nonzero fingerprint) AND the derived witness shows genuine accounted rounding AND protected cells read clean. CL-G4 -> DEMONSTRATED iff the boundary pair certifies-above / refuses-below at the pinned floor. K-G3 (REFUTE-ROW, continue — NOT a halt): any cell whose account does not close (FAIL_entangled) or any protected cell with a nonzero fingerprint (FAIL_predicate) -> CL-G3 REFUTED, scope reduced, witness and chain preserved. PARTIAL until both runs match (PMG-B.4).
